title: feat: Add GitHub PR tools to MCP server
description: Add MCP tools for working with GitHub Pull Requests, extending the existing github.ts server. Currently the bot can only create feature request issues — this adds full PR workflow capabilities from Signal.
acceptanceCriteria: All 6 tools are implemented in bot/src/mcp/servers/github.ts
Uses gh api for viewing individual PRs (avoids GraphQL errors)
Uses gh pr commands for actions (list, comment, review, merge, diff)
Unit tests cover all handlers with mocked gh CLI calls
Bot can respond to PR queries via Signal
